text: So hello everyone, my name is. I am discuss about the generative AI. So what is generative AI? Generative AI is a type of artificial intelligence designed to create new content such as text, image, music or even code. While learning patterns from existing data. These models generate original outputs that are open industry level from human created content. These models use techniques like deep learning and neural network to generate output. So how generative AI works Core mechanism training and interface interference Generative AI is a training on large data sets like text, image, audio or video using deep learning networks. During training training, the model learn parameters billion or billion of them that helps them predict or generate content. Here model generate output visit all learn patterns and prompt provided by media type Text user starts language model LLMs to predict next token in a sequence. Enable coherent paragraph crops or easy generation Image diffusion model like tail or stable diffusion. Start with noise and it noise to create realistic visual text to speech model synthesize human likewise by modeling feature based on prompt video. Multi model systems like Sora, by OpenAI or Runway generate sort coherent videos, clips from text or other prompts. Third one is agent in generative AI modern system often using agents which are which are saming autonomous components that interact with the environment.
